overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a flooded inner courtyard in Saint Denis during a heavy rainstorm. The player explores historic brick architecture with overgrown tropical vegetation and wrought iron balconies, transitioning from a main courtyard through a narrow passage to an upper area with dramatic sky views.

character in dark clothing runs across the courtyard from left to right

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward while panning left to observe the flooded courtyard and surrounding brick architecture

notable_agents.action: character runs quickly across the courtyard from left to right, splashing through the water

raised stone planter box filled with dense palm trees and ferns
stone archway leading to another courtyard area
wet cobblestone ground covered in water with visible puddles and reflections
weathered wooden barrels stacked against the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked historic courtyard with red brick buildings and a central garden of palm trees. Heavy rain creates ripples across the flooded cobblestone ground. A text overlay identifies the location as Saint Denis, and a character runs across the courtyard as the camera pans left to explore the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching narrow passage between brick buildings

events.description: entering narrow flooded passage between wooden barriers

agents.ego_description: walking toward the left side of the courtyard and entering a narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: wooden plank barriers blocking off the sides of the narrow entry passage

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the main garden area, the camera approaches a narrow passage on the left side of the courtyard. The wooden barriers of the passage come into view as the palm tree planter and distant archway fall behind. The ground remains flooded cobblestone as the transition to the enclosed space begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow flooded alley between brick walls with overgrown grass

events.description: exiting narrow passage into upper courtyard with historic balconies

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the narrow passage with flooded ground and overgrown vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: tall brick walls on both sides creating a narrow corridor
flooded dirt path with overgrown grass and weeds growing through the water
wooden crate or box partially submerged in the flooded path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a tight corridor between brick walls, leaving the main courtyard behind. The ground transitions from cobblestone to a flooded dirt path with overgrown grass. Wooden barriers line the entrance as the passage leads toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper courtyard with historic building featuring wrought iron balconies

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the sky and upper balconies against the light

agents.ego_description: looking up at the building architecture and sky, observing the rain falling against the backlight

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the upper balcony looking over the railing

entered.detail: multi-story historic building with arched doorways and wrought iron balconies
ornate iron railings on the upper floors of the building
tall tree silhouetted against the bright sky with sun backlighting
bright sky visible above the buildings with rain falling

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into an upper courtyard, the view opens to reveal a stunning historic building with multiple levels of wrought iron balconies. The camera tilts upward to show rain falling against a bright sky, with a large tree silhouetted by the backlight. A figure stands on the upper balcony observing the courtyard below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched historic courtyard that transitions from an open garden into a narrow passage and finally opens onto an elevated architectural vista. It begins in a flooded cobblestone square surrounded by red brick buildings and palm trees, panning left as a character runs through the heavy rain. As the camera moves away from the central garden, it approaches and enters a tight corridor lined with wooden barriers, where the ground shifts from cobblestone to a flooded dirt path overgrown with grass. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the enclosure into an upper courtyard, revealing a grand historic building adorned with multiple levels of wrought iron balconies. Finally, the camera tilts upward toward a bright, backlit sky where rain falls against the silhouette of a large tree and a figure watches from a high balcony.
